name: Direct Hiring Manager Outreach
description: Message to a hiring manager after seeing their LinkedIn post about an opening
html_content:
Hi {{receiver_name}},

I came across your LinkedIn post about the {{ROLE}} opening on your team at {{company_name}}, and I'd love to be considered for the role.

A bit about me — I'm Tejas, currently an SDE-1 at Interface.ai with 2 years of experience (including internship) at YC-backed and well-funded startups, including one backed by WhatsApp's co-founder. I studied at IIIT Gwalior and have a strong background in distributed systems, open-source contributions, and problem solving (Knight on LeetCode, 1880+ rating).

I've attached my resume for your review. Would be happy to share more details or hop on a quick call at your convenience.

Thanks so much for reading this far!

Best,
Tejas Thombare

global_variables.description: URL to LinkedIn post or job portal
